name: Push Preparation to Employee Trackers
script:
for row in doc.preparation_record:
    if not row.employee:
        continue

    emp = frappe.get_doc("Employee", row.employee)

    emp.custom_passport_no = row.passport_no
    emp.custom_passport_date_of_issue = row.passport_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_passport_expiry_date_ = row.passport_expiry_date
    emp.custom_civil_id_no = row.civil_id_no
    emp.custom_civil_id_date_of_issue = row.civil_id_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_civil_id_expiry_date = row.civil_id_expiry_date
    emp.custom_mol_contract_no = row.mol_contract_no
    emp.custom_mol_contract_date_of_issue = row.mol_contract_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_mol_contract_expiry_date = row.mol_contract_expiry_date
    emp.custom_medical = row.medical
    emp.custom_medical_date_of_issue = row.medical_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_medical_expiry_date = row.medical_expiry_date
    emp.custom_bls = row.bls
    emp.custom_bls_date_of_issue = row.bls_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_bls_expiry_date = row.bls_expiry_date
    emp.custom_acls = row.acls
    emp.custom_acls_date_of_issue = row.acls_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_acls_expiry_date = row.acls_expiry_date
    emp.custom_nocexit_document = row.nocexit_document
    emp.custom_noc_date_of_issue = row.noc_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_noc_expiry_date = row.noc_expiry_date
    emp.custom_data_flow_no = row.data_flow_no
    emp.custom_data_flow_date_of_issue = row.data_flow_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_data_flow_expiry_date = row.data_flow_expiry_date
    emp.custom_visa_date_of_issue = row.visa_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_visa_date_of_expiry = row.visa_date_of_expiry
    emp.custom_prometric__pearson_vue = row.prometric__pearson_vue
    emp.custom_prometric_date_of_issue = row.prometric_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_prometric_expiry_date = row.prometric_expiry_date
    emp.custom_police_clearance = row.police_clearance
    emp.custom_police_clearance_date_of_issue = row.police_clearance_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_police_clearance_expiry_date = row.police_clearance_expiry_date
    emp.custom_license_no = row.license_no
    emp.custom_license_date_of_issue = row.license_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_license_expiry_date = row.license_expiry_date
    emp.custom_cv = row.cv
    emp.custom_cv_date_of_issue = row.cv_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_cv_expiry_date = row.cv_expiry_date
    emp.custom_signed_offer_letter = row.signed_offer_letter
    emp.custom_offer_letter_date_of_issue = row.offer_letter_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_offer_letter_expiry_date = row.offer_letter_expiry_date
    emp.custom_highest_certificate = row.highest_certificate
    emp.custom_certificate_date_of_issue = row.certificate_date_of_issue
    emp.custom_certificate_expiry_date = row.certificate_expiry_date

    emp.save(ignore_permissions=True)

emp.save(ignore_permissions=True)
